revisedPrompt:
Generate one raster PNG image.

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: Open Dungeon right sidebar category icon
Primary request: Story category icon: an open leather-bound quest book with a small glowing bookmark and faint dungeon map lines, dungeon-era fantasy tabletop feel, warm torchlit highlights, chunky hand-painted RPG app icon style, matching a dark stone dungeon door icon vibe.
Scene/backdrop: simple dark stone vignette, no separate props.
Subject: centered single open leather-bound quest book, visible aged pages, faint dungeon map lines as abstract non-readable markings, one small glowing bookmark.
Style/medium: painterly game UI icon, chunky hand-painted RPG app icon style, crisp silhouette, readable at small size, no text.
Composition/framing: square icon, centered single object, generous padding, clean silhouette.
Lighting/mood: amber torch glow, charcoal stone shadows, inviting adventure mood.
Color palette: warm leather browns, aged parchment, amber highlights, dark charcoal stone shadows.
Materials/textures: worn leather cover, parchment pages, subtle stone background texture.
Constraints: no letters, no readable words, no watermark, no modern objects, no UI frame, no extra characters.
